name: Butter Cake (Kh)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease two 9-inch layer pans; dust with flour.
3. Cream the butter and sugar together in a bowl until thoroughly mixed.
4. Add yolks and beat well.
5. In a separate bowl, stir flour, baking powder, and salt together.
6. Alternately add the flour mixture and milk to the sugar mixture; beat well after each addition. Stir in vanilla.
7. Beat whites until stiff; fold into batter.
8. Pour batter into pans.
9. Bake for 30 minutes.
10. Cool in pans on a wire rack for 10 minutes, then turn out onto a rack; cool completely before frosting.
11. To make frosting, combine sugar, butter, salt, milk, and juice in a bowl; beat with a mixer until smooth. Frost the sides and top of the cooled cake.
12. Variation: To make chocolate frosting, melt 1 ounce unsweetened baking chocolate and add to the remaining ingredients.
